label.productDescription: Targeted PM formula supporting sleep depth, nervous-system calm, and next-day cognitive steadiness.
label.suggestedUse: Adults, take 2 capsules 30-60 minutes before sleep with water. Use nightly for best consistency.
label.warnings: Keep out of reach of children. Do not use if seal is broken. Consult your healthcare provider before use if pregnant, nursing, taking medication, or managing a medical condition.
label.footer: Manufactured for Sun Daughter Wellness  |  cGMP Facility  |  Made in USA

board.positioning: A premium sleep-support system balancing hard evidence with emotionally calm luxury cues.
proofPoints: Cross-surface consistency from label to mockup

recraft.scenePrompt: Clean, photorealistic studio background plate for a premium supplement bottle. Seamless pure white or very light gray backdrop, soft and even studio lighting from all angles, creating subtle, elegant shadows. Perfect for a central bottle composite. Minimalist, professional, high-key lighting. No bottles, no labels, no text, no logos, no packaging, no watermarks.
recraft.moodPrompt: Sun Daughter premium brand mood texture, abstract paper and brushed metal gradients, calm scientific wellness aesthetic, restrained luxury, no text, no logo, no product, no packaging, no watermark

render.geminiSceneDescription: Hero product shot, bottle rotated to straight front view (0-degree yaw), camera orthogonal to label plane, centered composition, full label front panel visible and legible, neutral seamless studio background, soft even lighting, subtle natural shadows, no props, no hands.
render.geminiAdvancedCompositionPrompt:
CRITICAL LABEL PRESERVATION:
- Use the label reference literally.
- Preserve exact text, typography, layout, colors, and logo artwork from the label reference.
- Do not invent, replace, or alter any label wording or logo details.

BOTTLE PRESERVATION:
- Use bottle shape, cap, and material from bottle reference.

ROTATION / CAMERA REQUIREMENT:
- Rotate bottle to a straight-on front view (0-degree yaw).
- Center the primary label panel toward the camera.
- Keep the front label area fully visible and readable.

PHYSICAL WRAP REQUIREMENTS:
- Label must follow bottle curvature and perspective.
- Match scene reflections/specular highlights.
- Match lighting, contact shadows, and cast shadows.
- Avoid pasted/cutout artifacts and sticker look.

GENERATION TASK:
- Create a new image by combining the references.
- Take label from image 1 and apply it to bottle from image 2.
- Keep product hero realism and clear label legibility.

NEGATIVE CONSTRAINTS:
- no rewritten text
- no gibberish typography
- no extra logos beyond label reference
- no duplicate labels
- no watermark
- no flat sticker look

SCENE RULE:
- The scene description controls only environment/camera/lighting.
- Do not restyle bottle or label from the scene description.

SCENE DESCRIPTION: Hero product shot, bottle rotated to straight front view (0-degree yaw), camera orthogonal to label plane, centered composition, full label front panel visible and legible, neutral seamless studio background, soft even lighting, subtle natural shadows, no props, no hands.
Output 1:1 aspect ratio.
